text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ugh... It hurts. My head is pounding.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Why was the teacher so angry? Even Mom and
Dad wouldn't be this mad...
choice_data_list: Why did you get in trouble?
Why did you get in trouble?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to see Prez, so I opened the door of the
student council office...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But the teacher was all "Teio! What do you think
you're doing, entering the student council office
willy-nilly?!"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Ouuuch! Just remembering it makes me wince all
over again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio's splitting headache continues to bother her
for the rest of the day...
